guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel layout without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid flexbox/grid with flex-wrap + gap, logical properties, intrinsic sizing and min-inline-size:0 on flex items with long content; §6 overflow-tracking (overflow:auto scroll containers) — avoid fixed widths that overflow narrow viewports.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — distribution rows use grid with a minmax(0,11rem) first track + min-inline-size:0 tracks so long topic names ellipsis instead of overflowing; chip rows use flex-wrap+gap; desk board uses grid repeat(auto-fill, minmax(min(100%,15rem),1fr)); textareas are 100% width. Verified scrollWidth==clientWidth at 360px and 1280px.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Break up long main-thread tasks / yield so inference doesn't spike INP.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — all inference (single + batched classification, and the multi-model route→summarise chain) runs in a Web Worker off the main thread; the 'as you type' surface is debounced (350ms). The batch page uses one pipeline pass, not a per-item main-thread loop.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance inference-off-main-thread = pass; console clean during typing

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible live region status loading progress; meter component
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce loading/ready/error via role=status aria-live; expose probability bars as role=meter with aria-valuenow; every button has an accessible name.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the shared loader status is role=status aria-live=polite; each distribution bar is role=meter with aria-valuemin/max/now; run-status regions are live; sample chips + buttons are labelled real buttons.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.

openQuestions: The multi-model route→summarise page loads ~263MB (DistilBART); is that acceptable on constrained mobile, or should it gate the heavy model behind an explicit opt-in beyond the Download button?
Keyboard focus order + visible focus were spot-checked; a full keyboard-only pass across all four ladder pages would strengthen the a11y evidence.

followUpGoals.goal: Consider a lighter summariser (e.g. distilbart-xsum-6-6 or a t5-small) for the news-topic multi-model page to reduce the ~263MB combined download on mobile.

summary: Revision-2 agent matrix pass for news-topic-classification (text-classification, wasm, tarekziade/topic_classification, q8 ~13MB). Real headless run confirmed: correct multi-label topic scores, cached auto-init with no Load button, 0 horizontal overflow desktop+mobile, clean console, good light+dark contrast. Page copy corrected from 'softmax' to honest multi-label sigmoid after a Node cross-check. Support flipped to ok on both classes.
